rationale: In the citing paper, Singh, Hansen, and Gupta (2005) appears in a single grouped literature-review citation that lists prior studies of multicategory brand choice. The citation is used only to categorize existing work as focusing on within-category brand choice across categories, not to build the proposed model, derive equations, or interpret results from that specific study. There is no distinct follow-up discussion of this paper's framework, measures, or findings elsewhere in the article.
